# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: orders-api
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: orders
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payments-api
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: inventory-api
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: shipping-api
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: shipping
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: users-api
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: users
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: orders-from-api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: orders-api
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: api-gateway
      namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: orders-from-payments
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: orders-api
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: payments
      namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payments-from-orders
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: payments-api
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: orders
      namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-from-orders
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-api
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: orders
      namespace: microservices
---

  name: shipping-from-orders
  namespace: microservices

  server:
    name: shipping-api
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: orders
      namespace: microservices
---

  namespace: microservices

  server:
    name: users-api
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: api-gateway
      namespace: microservices
---

    - kind: ServiceAccount

kind: ServerAuthorization

  name: inventory-from-api-gateway

  server:
    name: inventory-api
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: api-gateway
      namespace: microservices

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: shipping-from-api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: shipping-api
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: api-gateway
      namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: metrics-from-monitoring
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: orders-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      identities:
        - monitoring.sa.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: healthcheck-from-kubelet
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: users-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      identities:
        - kubelet.node.local
